title: Nagaichuvai Galatta
desc: A complete collection of the funniest and most entertaining comedy scenes, videos, and moments from popular Tamil movies, guaranteed to bring laughter and joy to viewers of all ages.

title: Thirai Thendral
desc: The host connects with viewers through warm, meaningful conversations while playing their requested Tamil movie songs, creating an engaging and interactive musical experience.

title: Sugamana Ragangal
desc: A curated collection of popular melodious songs, featuring compositions and performances by renowned artists, presented back-to-back for an enchanting musical experience.

title: Bakthi Paadalgal
desc: A rich compilation of melodious songs, sung and composed by talented artists, designed to inspire devotion, uplift the spirit, and create a serene, spiritually enriching experience for listeners.

title: Aalaya Vazhipadu
desc: A religious leader highlights the significance of worship, explaining how devotion and spiritual practices bring peace, happiness, and harmony into the lives of individuals and communities.

title: Aanmeega Kadhaigal
desc: The host presents spiritual discourses, narrating stories and teachings from religious texts to inspire viewers to live a righteous, virtuous life filled with faith and moral values.

title: Nalla Kaalam Pirakkudhu
desc: An astrologer offers daily forecasts and insightful predictions for people of all sun signs, interpreting life events and guidance through the principles of the 27 nakshatras.

title: News
desc: Stay updated with the latest headlines, breaking stories, and key developments from around the world, keeping viewers informed every day.

title: Vanakkam Thamizha
desc: A morning talk show featuring celebrities and experts from diverse fields who share insights on various topics, offering viewers an engaging and informative start to their day.
